hooks.name: notify
hooks.description: Native macOS notification when Claude needs your attention (auto-installs alerter via Homebrew)
customizeHints: Icon  → replace {hookDir}/icon.png with your own 512×512 PNG
Test  → node {hookDir}/test.mjs   (fire a fake Notification end-to-end)

hooks.name: pr-create-guard
hooks.description: Workflow guard: after `gh pr create`, query the new PR and inject a body snapshot (headings + TODO counts) so the Agent can verify scope / acceptance / risks / TODO

hooks.name: pr-ready-guard
hooks.description: Workflow guard: block `gh pr ready` on unpushed commits, stray planning docs, or unfinalized active specs in docs/specs/; filter-inject PR body snapshot otherwise
